preregistration: N-Substrate N-21 v3 — Edlund 2011 + Albantakis 2014 10-seed bootstrap
rationale: v1+v2 ran without pre-registered C1 thresholds. Per v2 §4 blocker #5, future cycles MUST pre-register before launch. This file is written and committed to file-system state BEFORE any v3 worker is dispatched to ubu1/ubu2. Sign-and-magnitude criteria are derived from Edlund 2011 (positive Pearson r) and Albantakis 2014 (monotonic concept/Φ rise with env complexity).

edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.metric_primary: Pearson r(Φ, fitness) over all valid (Φ, fit) pairs across 10 seeds × 200 gen
edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.metric_secondary: Pearson r(top_phi, best_fit) per-gen trajectory, averaged across seeds
edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.PASS_criterion: mean r(Φ, fitness) >= +0.30 with two-sided p < 0.05 across >= 10 seeds, AND >= 7/10 seeds individually have r > 0
edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.FAIL_criterion: mean r(Φ, fitness) <= -0.30 with two-sided p < 0.05 across >= 10 seeds, AND >= 7/10 seeds individually have r < 0 (= IIT prediction reversed)
edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.INCONCLUSIVE_criterion: |mean r| < 0.30 OR seed-variance(r) > 0.5 OR < 7/10 seeds agree on sign OR p >= 0.05
edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.disconnected_net_handling: connectivity-preserving mutation (no edge deletion that would orphan a node), AND fallback: if Φ is NaN on full system, re-measure on largest weakly-connected subgraph >= 3 nodes
edlund_2011_animat_phi_fitness.approximation: CUT_ONE_APPROXIMATION = True (sign-robust per v2; magnitude down-biased)

albantakis_2014_envcomplexity.metric_primary: Monotonic ordering simple < medium < complex on mean concept count
albantakis_2014_envcomplexity.metric_secondary: Monotonic ordering simple < medium < complex on mean Φ
albantakis_2014_envcomplexity.PASS_criterion: concept-count monotonic (simple < medium < complex; strict <=) across >= 7/10 seeds, AND mean concept count per env all >= 5 (no env collapse)
albantakis_2014_envcomplexity.FAIL_criterion: non-monotonic concept-count across >= 7/10 seeds OR mean concept count < 5 in any env (capacity collapse)
albantakis_2014_envcomplexity.auxiliary_PARTIAL_flag: if Φ-monotonic in >= 7/10 seeds even when concepts are not, flag PARTIAL_PHI_ONLY

phase3_cut_one_robustness.scope: 1 seed of Edlund, short generations (50 gen, top-1 phi every 10 gen) with EXACT_MIP=True (CUT_ONE_APPROXIMATION=False)
phase3_cut_one_robustness.purpose: estimate magnitude bias of cut-one vs exact; sign should be robust
phase3_cut_one_robustness.PASS_robustness: sign of r(Φ, fitness) preserved between cut-one and exact-mip on same seed
phase3_cut_one_robustness.FAIL_robustness: sign flips between cut-one and exact-mip on same seed

honest_C3_constraints: If 7-node × 10-seed × 200-gen exceeds 5h on either host, complete what's feasible and document remainder
ubu1 has 53G free; ubu2 has 793G free; minimize footprint; clean intermediate logs
v1 and v2 dirs are read-only references

verdict_table_template.edlund_v3: PASS|FAIL|INCONCLUSIVE — to be filled after Phase 4
verdict_table_template.albantakis_v3: PASS|FAIL|INCONCLUSIVE — to be filled after Phase 4
verdict_table_template.cut_one_robustness: ROBUST|FLIPPED|UNTESTED — to be filled after Phase 3
